from datetime import datetime


def filter_events(event_strings):
    cutoff = datetime(2024, 1, 1)
    fmt = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"
    parsed = [datetime.strptime(raw, fmt) for raw in event_strings]
    return [ts for ts in parsed if ts > cutoff]


def compute_deltas(timestamp_strings):
    fmt = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"
    parsed = [datetime.strptime(s, fmt) for s in timestamp_strings]
    return [(parsed[i + 1] - parsed[i]).total_seconds() for i in range(len(parsed) - 1)]
